title: Bitter Crunchy Kenyana Wakati Stir-fry
description: A nut-free-friendly stir-fry that combines the bitterness of dried red chillies with a crunchy texture to potentially aid in hangover recovery.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp dried red chillies
ingredients.notes: Soaked in hot water for 30 minutes to soften

instructions: Saute chopped onion and minced garlic in a pan until soft.
Add soaked dried red chillies and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Stir in soy sauce and kale. Cook together until the kale is wilted but still slightly crunchy.
Drizzle with sesame oil just before serving to enhance flavor.
